import { IconBook2, IconCertificate, IconVideo } from '@tabler/icons-react' import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs' const learning = [ { name: 'Curriculum', value: 'curriculum', icon: IconBook2, content: ( <> Explore your learning path. Access structured modules, downloadable resources, and interactive quizzes designed to master your chosen subject. ) }, { name: 'Live Lessons', value: 'lessons', icon: IconVideo, content: ( <> Join our expert-led sessions. Engage in real-time Q&A, participate in group discussions, and watch recorded sessions at your own convenience. ) }, { name: 'Certification', value: 'certification', icon: IconCertificate, content: ( <> Earn your professional validation. Complete the final assessment to receive a blockchain-verified certificate to showcase your skills to the world. ) } ] const Tabs13 = () => { return (
{learning.map(({ icon: Icon, name, value }) => ( {name} ))}
{learning.map(tab => (

{tab.name}

{tab.content}

 ))} ) } export default Tabs13
